scope: system-dev-planner build entities and task-graph outer loop

orchestration.reset_observation: Fresh observation retained route definitions and current artifacts while discarding prior PASS/FAIL assumptions.

reset_facts: The canonical graph has 40 nodes and all 40 runtime states are done with a verified hash pin.
Route/inventory parity and complete validation pass for 14 routes; every route has current-byte SHA-256 evidence.
C13 is the sole lock writer and exposes guarded read/cleanup boundaries to C11/C07.
The approved dependency is C09 -> C14 -> C12 -> C11; C14 has no C12 import.
TG-C08 emitted build_completed with completion_gate ok after both structural proposals were accepted.
Plugin package PKG-002 through PKG-008 and the strong composition validator pass.

thinking_methods.name: 批判的思考
thinking_methods.result: Route PASSを鵜呑みにせず、current SHA・graph pin・package gate・runtime negative caseで再反証し、残差0を確認。

thinking_methods.name: 演繹思考
thinking_methods.result: routeのbuild_target/depends_onからC13/C14/C12/C11の実体と順序を導き、全結線を機械検証。

thinking_methods.name: 帰納的思考
thinking_methods.result: SHA付きscript routeの慣例を全14 routeへ一般化し、汎用文言だけのC03-C05証跡を解消。

thinking_methods.name: アブダクション
thinking_methods.result: lock bypass・cleanup race・C14依存逆転の共通原因を、自然言語契約と機械ownerの乖離と特定して境界API化。

thinking_methods.name: 垂直思考
thinking_methods.result: Whyを掘り下げ、lockは同時実行隔離、handoffは実行可能性の所有境界、pinは仕様改善の承認証跡と再確定。

thinking_methods.name: 要素分解
thinking_methods.result: frontmatter・manifest・schema・script・report・task-state・projectionを独立検査し、各欠落を個別に閉鎖。

thinking_methods.name: MECE
thinking_methods.result: 矛盾・漏れ・整合性・依存の4条件とroute target/args/depsを重複なく網羅し全PASS。

thinking_methods.name: 2軸思考
thinking_methods.result: 安全効果×実装コストで、promotion lock gateとmanaged-context fail-closedを最優先、投影更新を終端処理に配置。

thinking_methods.name: プロセス思考
thinking_methods.result: accept→derive→repin→dispatch→done→TG-C08→TG-C09の時系列を再生し、build_completedまで到達。

thinking_methods.name: メタ思考
thinking_methods.result: 12 componentで閉じるという旧粒度を撤回し、lock lifecycleとhandoff producerを独立componentとする14実体に再定義。

thinking_methods.name: 抽象化思考
thinking_methods.result: 必須出力はproducer+schema+digest+consumer+owner、ライフサイクルはsole writer+read-only validatorを必要とする汎用則に集約。

thinking_methods.name: ダブル・ループ思考
thinking_methods.result: discovered-taskを単なパッチで終わらせず、task spec・inventory・handoff・graphに還流して再駆動。

thinking_methods.name: ブレインストーミング
thinking_methods.result: lock強制案をhook限定・C12限定・C14限定・C11 gate・共有APIの5案比較後、C11 gate+C13 public APIに収束。

thinking_methods.name: 水平思考
thinking_methods.result: dev-graphのall-or-none receiptとHarness Creatorのcompletion/projection patternを移植し、owner分離と終端投影を統一。

thinking_methods.name: 逆説思考
thinking_methods.result: lockが一切ない場合と古いsummaryだけがある場合を試し、前者はpromotion拒否、後者は運用誤判定と特定。

thinking_methods.name: 類推思考
thinking_methods.result: C14 manifest digestのcurrent-byte原則をroute reportに類推し、14/14 SHA一致を必須証跡化。

thinking_methods.name: if思考
thinking_methods.result: 10倍の同時runを想定し、fixed lock+O_EXCL+flockとowner/digest照合で、guard crash後も自動解放されることを確認。

thinking_methods.name: 素人思考
thinking_methods.result: setupのcopy/paste観点でpromote必須run/session引数とrelease ownerを修正し、blocked表示を解消。

thinking_methods.name: システム思考
thinking_methods.result: C09→C14→C12→evaluator→C11→dev-graphとC09→C13→C07/C11を14 route全体で閉鎖。

thinking_methods.name: 因果関係分析
thinking_methods.result: active lock未強制→promotion迂回、managed context fail-open→hook無効、投影未更新→完了判定誤りの各chainを切断。

thinking_methods.name: 因果ループ
thinking_methods.result: spec-gap→structural proposal→approval→graph repin→done→knowledgeの負帰還をbuild_completed eventまで閉じた。

thinking_methods.name: トレードオン思考
thinking_methods.result: 仕様忠実度と簡潔性を、C14のstandalone precheck+C12 final authorityという第三案で両立。

thinking_methods.name: プラスサム思考
thinking_methods.result: plannerは承認済み単一DAG、builderは自己完結生成、review/operationはSHA・receipt・projectionを得る設計に統合。

thinking_methods.name: 価値提案思考
thinking_methods.result: 確定system specからexact-13を安全に生成・評価・昇格・登録する価値が、必須handoffとlockで実行可能になった。

thinking_methods.name: 戦略的思考
thinking_methods.result: 3か月後の変更に備え、versioned schema・workflow manifest・package contract・current SHA・owner境界を正本化。

thinking_methods.name: why思考
thinking_methods.result: 表層の引数漏れでなく、生成・cleanup・promotion・receiptのowner未固定まで遡及し、全ownerを実装と文書で一致。

thinking_methods.name: 改善思考
thinking_methods.result: lock不在・wrong owner・expired・managed config不正・cleanup競合をnegative regressionへ固定し、再発を防止。

thinking_methods.name: 仮説思考
thinking_methods.result: 「Harness Creator仕様で全て実行可能」仮説をpackage・composition・runtime・graph・routeの各gateで逆検証し、対象範囲で支持。

thinking_methods.name: 論点思考
thinking_methods.result: 決定点をactive lock強制、C14/C12依存方向、current-byte provenance、completion projectionの4点に絞り全て確定。

thinking_methods.name: KJ法
thinking_methods.result: findingをlock境界、handoff/receipt境界、governance/package、provenance/finalizationの4島に群化し、全島の残差0を確認。

resolved_findings.title: C13 lifecycle existed but initial promotion could bypass it
resolved_findings.fix: C11 now requires exact active repository/run/session/feature/digest/TTL through C13 public validation before promotion or recovery writes; negative tests cover absent, wrong owner, and expired locks.

resolved_findings.title: C14 depended on C12 contrary to approved structural graph
resolved_findings.fix: C14 now has standalone prechecks and no C12 import; inventory, handoff, task specs, composition, and graph use C09->C14->C12.

resolved_findings.title: C07 called a C13 private cleanup without operation serialization
resolved_findings.fix: C07 calls C13 public cleanup; C13 revalidates path/repository/expiry under operation lock.

resolved_findings.title: Operation guard directory could survive a crash and deadlock lifecycle
resolved_findings.fix: C13 uses crash-released advisory flock on the guard file.

resolved_findings.title: Managed repository context errors were caught as pass-through
resolved_findings.fix: Only genuinely unmanaged repos pass; existing managed marker plus C09 failure blocks Bash/Task and has a regression test.

resolved_findings.title: Registration receipt prose drifted from dev-graph schema
resolved_findings.fix: Documentation now names registered_at, node_ids, phase_refs, graph_revision_before/after, and graph_digest_after.

resolved_findings.title: Setup promote command missed required owner arguments and blurred release ownership
resolved_findings.fix: Added run/session arguments and assigned final release to C01/caller, not C11.

resolved_findings.title: Route reports lacked or mismatched current artifact SHA evidence
resolved_findings.fix: All 14 reports contain direct current-byte SHA evidence and all hashes match.

resolved_findings.title: Task/inventory/handoff dependency descriptions drifted
resolved_findings.fix: Canonical derivation validates 40 nodes and 14 topologically ordered routes with parity.

resolved_findings.title: Graph hash pin lagged post-approval specification refinements
resolved_findings.fix: Accepted proposal hashes and task-state were provenance-gated to the final canonical hash; dispatcher reports verified with empty ready/blocked sets.

resolved_findings.title: Build summary and HTML/Markdown projections remained at blocked 38/12
resolved_findings.fix: TG-C08 emitted build_completed and summary/projections were regenerated for 40/40, 14 routes, completion_gate ok.

resolved_findings.title: Harness Creator strong composition and package checks failed
resolved_findings.fix: Added package contract, workflow manifests, hook entry point, executable scripts, and allowed composition refs/types; PKG-002..008 and bundle validation pass.

verification.plugin_dev_planner_tests: 853 passed, 2 skipped, 1 unrelated missing bootstrap-fixture failure
